---
title: "AI and Agentic AI"
author: "Jon Minton"
date: 2026-03-14
categories: [hand-drawn, AI, agentic AI]
---

![AI 1.0](page-1.png)

![AI 2.0A](page-2.png)

![AI 2.0B](page-3.png)

![AI to Agentic AI](page-4.png)

![What affordances does machine open up for bot?](page-5.png)

![Why is AAI greater than the sum of its parts?](page-6.png)
